h1. AI Document and Chunk Builder

h2. Purpose

Convert structured Data Compass metadata into AI-readable, relationship-aware text chunks.

h2. Why This Matters

Raw JSON embeddings will produce weak search results. Chunks must describe the meaning of metadata in clear language and include enough relationship context to be useful.

h2. Chunk Types

|| Chunk Type || Purpose ||
| asset_summary | Summary of an asset |
| attribute_summary | Attribute/column-level search |
| lineage_summary | Provider/consumer and upstream/downstream relationships |
| service_summary | How an asset is exposed or consumed |
| classification_summary | PII/SPI/confidentiality/retention context |
| process_transformation_summary | Process and transformation logic |
| business_mapping_summary | Glossary/concept/data element mapping |

h2. Standard Chunk Schema

{code:language=json}
{
  "chunk_id": "",
  "chunk_type": "",
  "text": "",
  "source": {
    "guid": "",
    "jrn": "",
    "collection": "",
    "entity_type": "",
    "version": "",
    "lifecycleStatus": ""
  },
  "metadata": {
    "nodeId": "",
    "nodeType": "",
    "owners": [],
    "databaseType": "",
    "entityPhysicalType": "",
    "classification": "",
    "hasPII": false,
    "hasSPI": false
  },
  "relationships": {
    "datasetJrn": "",
    "distributionJrns": [],
    "upstreamJrns": [],
    "downstreamJrns": []
  }
}
{code}

h2. Primary Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| CHK-001 | Generate deterministic chunk IDs | P0 |
| CHK-002 | Include source GUID and JRN | P0 |
| CHK-003 | Generate Distribution summary chunks | P0 |
| CHK-004 | Generate Dataset summary chunks | P0 |
| CHK-005 | Generate Attribute chunks | P0 |
| CHK-006 | Generate DataService chunks | P1 |
| CHK-007 | Generate DataFlow lineage chunks | P1 |
| CHK-008 | Generate DataProcess transformation chunks | P1 |
| CHK-009 | Generate Report summary chunks | P1 |

h2. Sample Distribution Chunk Text

{code}
Distribution trade_exposure is a physical Databricks table in catalog risk and schema capital. It implements Dataset trade_exposure_dataset. It contains attributes including trade_id, book, and exposure_amount. It is owned by SID123 and SID456. Lifecycle status is PUBLISHED. Downstream consumers include DataProcess daily_risk_aggregation and Report capital_exposure_report.
{code}

h2. Pitfalls

|| Pitfall || Impact || Mitigation ||
| Raw JSON chunks | Poor semantic search | Use text templates |
| Overly large chunks | Low precision | Chunk by entity and purpose |
| Tiny chunks | No context | Include parent and relationship context |
| Missing source references | No traceability | Require GUID/JRN in every chunk |
| Missing lifecycle metadata | Stale records can be retrieved | Store lifecycleStatus in every chunk |
